name: tata-agent-bridge
description: Bridge between the Tata AI Software Factory dashboard and VS Code. Pulls assigned tasks and pushes progress, logs, commits, reviews and errors. Does not manage tickets — bridge only.

tata.dashboardUrl.description: Base URL of the Tata dashboard.

tata.categories.description: Task categories this worker will pull (empty = any).

tata.workspaceId.description: Optional workspace id to scope pulled tasks.

tata.syncIntervalMs.description: Realtime sync polling interval in milliseconds.

tata.codingStandardPath.description: Workspace-relative path to the coding standard the agent reads.

tata.compileCommand.description: Shell command the agent runs to compile/build the project (required to run the agent).

tata.testCommand.description: Optional shell command the agent runs to verify the code; must also pass before commit.

tata.maxFixIterations.description: Maximum code → compile → fix iterations before the agent gives up.

tata.autoCommit.description: Commit the generated code automatically on success (no push). Disable to leave changes staged for manual commit.
